name: E-Yantra
description: This club works in the E-Yantra lab. E-Yantra lab was established in 2013 with the collaboration of MHRD and IIT Bombay. IIT Bombay organises two competitions every year. One is the e-yantra robotics competition and the second is the e-yantra idea competition. Approximately 40 to 50 students participate every year from our institute. In 2013, our institute won the 5 th  position in the e-yantra idea competition and in 2018-19, we won the 1 st  position in the e-yantra robotics competition, and two students of our institute have been selected for a 45-day internship at IIT Bombay
